Hi all!

I will discontinue the topical dutasteride. It didn't do much at all, I used it for 10 months I think. That'll be that. I have otherwise not used any medications for many years.

I am staying in AirBNBs while I figure out my next spot, so I've asked my friend to print the forms [@DrEttinger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22307/) sent, and I will go to his place Saturday and print complete them, scan them in, and send to Dr Ettinger.

Will get a good protocol put in place moving forward and we'll start making real gains.

My brain function is way better, and anxiety levels are way down from what they were 8 months ago I absolutely promise you that. I also lost tonnes of fat, being so fat was crippling my self esteem. So that's also good. My bodyweight is 202.2lbs now. I feel good about that. Ideally, I want to be shredded / ripped, but I don't know how to best move forward with this myself. So I will get help.

We may not be in the best place hormonally right now in part due to the hair loss medication, but like I said, I am committed and we will devise a plan of attack and execute relentlessly.

BTW, Jan, I have actually uploaded the full DUTCH Plus test, it's attached the post above, and I have sent it to Dr Ettinger. I am sure once I've sent all my forms and had a discussion we'll figure things out.

Best wishes,
Ravi

On post #143
There is your Genova Diagnostic test report indicating that you have excessive amounts of testosterone.
Way over the green area they expect people to have.
\==============================================

On post #145
There is attached DUTCH test (10/26/2021)
that shows nil testosterone, real close to zero.
\================================================
**Please explain.**

/////////////////////////

My opinion about DHT.
There are two kinds of people who use DHT inhibiting stuff.
1\. they have high DHT to begin with, then when they use (DHT inhibiting stuff) they lower the DHT
BUT
their DHT even when lower, it is still within laboratory range

They have a better chances in correcting their sex status to better.

2\. you are working with 5a-DHT in below laboratory range
5a-DHT Below range 1.6 ng/mg (5 - 25)

..............................
Epi-Testosterone Within range 52.8 ng/mg 25 - 115

The way DUTCH works
Epi-Testosterone can be compared to a
Total Testosterone done with blood test

So, I would read that as
your testicles are producing insufficient testosterone.
But please do blood test to make sure.
\---------------------------
life is
#1 about you
#2 about procreation
#3 sex
#4 healthy life
\---------------------------
Usually, all four above are fitting in one line, sometime they not (#1 is always (or should be #1 for most)

To have sex and healthy life you need lots of testosterone.

To procreate you need good FSH hormone, so you can have good sperm.
Supplemental testosterone will make you sterile (not 100% but close)

You can deal with that
but
you need to know lots of details
and
have cooperating partner.

With lots of work and stress the two of you may produce offspring that will/may possibly have lots of headwinds in his/her/its life. It is still all about #1, but you should clearly understand that part.

do
LH, FSH, and prolactin.

take a look at LH
if LH is high, your testicles are not able to make more testosterone-----must supplement to get testosterone higher
if LH is low, ---->> you may possibly raise testosterone by injecting HCG. That would be your first choice, especially if you want to protect your fertility.

In any case
good luck

add

homocysteine

Thyroglobulin Antibody

IGF-1, IGFBP-3, Growth hormone

### Ravi Sandhu — 2021-11-28T21:47:01+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-306766>

A gentleman I know also provided the following thoughts on my labs:

-   Your overall levels of estrogen in urine is pretty damn high. Your metabolism of it is efficient though. Your body is doing it's best to break it down and get it out of your system with pretty good methylation activity. One potential reason for this is because your testosterone is tanked. Meaning, it's being aromatized to estrogen as discussed before.
-   Your cortisone levels are high but they're not being converted that much to cortisol which is a good thing. This can simply be a feature of the ketogenic diet so as long as you feel you're not being overly stressed out I think you'll be okay.
-   Your Etiocholanolone levels are very elevated and in this case, with normal androgen levels but low T levels, this is simply because there is a lack of overall testosterone available. It could indicate some mild inflammation as well but this is not likely.

**Testosterone: the therapy for real gentlemen Paperback – January 1, 2019**
by [MD Thierry Hertoghe](https://www.amazon.com/s/ref=dp_byline_sr_book_1?ie=UTF8&field-author=MD+Thierry+Hertoghe&text=MD+Thierry+Hertoghe&sort=relevancerank&search-alias=books) (Author)

Testosterone, the therapy for real gentlemen is an innovative book, based on Dr. Hertoghe’s vast experience that gives practical advice to physicians about what they need to know about testosterone to administer it to men. The topics covered include: l Where and how much testosterone is produced l Testosterone’s physical and psychological benefits for men and its prevention of age-related diseases l Testosterone as a safe treatment for deficiency, and the risk of avoiding treatment l Information on potential risks of testosterone therapy and how to overcome them l How to diagnose testosterone deficiency: symptoms, signs (with pictures), and ideal ranges for laboratory test results l The average age to start with testosterone treatment l **3****0 steps to increase testosterone naturally without testosterone supplementation** l How to treat with testosterone: bioidentical testosterone or anabolic steroids l When to give testosterone systemically and when topically l The type of testosterone, route of administration, and appropriate doses l How to start treatment: low or high dose, or the appropriate dose, to personalize the therapy l How to monitor testosterone treatment l How to adjust the dose to sports activities, stressful situations, disease, or decreased activity l How to solve problems during follow up: acne, edema, **smaller testicles**, **decreased fertility**, and other excess testosterone signs l The causes and risks of high estrogen levels; the inconvenience of a high DHT-low testosterone imbalance; how to achieve the right balance between testosterone, estrogens, and DHT l How to solve problems specific to men: **male pattern hair loss**, breast enlargement, erectile dysfunction, Peyronie’s disease, prostate hypertrophy, prostate cancer l Tips from experienced doctors

\============================================

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-306788>

[Dr. Thierry Hertoghe, MD HGH and other Hormones (antiagemedical.com)](https://www.antiagemedical.com/dr-thierry-hertoghe-md-hgh-and-other-hormones/)

**Can Anti-Aging and Bioidentical Hormones Help You Live Longer?- with Dr. Thierry Hertoghe**

We’ve been following Dr. Thierry Hertoghe and his lectures at the American Academy of Anti-Aging Medicine for a number of years. It’s always a pleasure to listen to his talks and watch him discuss his views on anti-aging and longevity.

In the first video, Dr. Hertoghe speaks about bioidentical hormones and if they can help you live longer.

**8 Hormones for Reversing Aging,** **Restore Libido** **in Men with Dr. Thierry Hertoghe**

In the second video, Dr. Hertoghe is interviewed by Dr. Nick Delgado. They discuss the benefits of hormone replacement and peptides as supplements. Their discussion includes [HGH](https://www.antiagemedical.com/hgh-cost/), IGF-1, [Vasopressin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vasopressin), testosterone in women, **hair loss**, among other supplemental therapies.

Jul 19, 2017
**Anti-Aging - Tools For Living Longer and Reversing Aging**

In the final video, Dr. Thierry Hertoghe discuss Anti-Aging and the potential science of reversing aging. We are now closer than ever where we can make smart choice which will significantly influence the aging process.

As Dr. Hertoghe suggests, don’t think you don’t have hormone deficiencies. With the current state of the modern western diet, pollution, and other factors, Dr. Hortoghe suggest that **even many babies are born with some hormone deficiencies.** As he discusses, we have over 35 important hormones and many are sub-optimal.

Review his views on:

1.  [Hormones](https://www.antiagemedical.com/hormone-therapy/)
2.  [Stem Cells](https://www.antiagemedical.com/cellular-therapies/)
3.  Telomeres

Functional medicine is at the cusp of a major revolution. Learn what all of us can do to make life and health-span happier, longer, and better.

**Anti-Aging - Tools For Living Longer**
Sep 12, 2016

Thanks for this Jan!

All very interesting things to consider, and we can definitely explore these areas.

It could definitely get rather complicated, so for now, I think I will try to get a really solid program from Dr Ettinger and do the best I can naturally. As you highlight there, it seems like we can enhance hormones naturally.

I was out today scoping out locations for my next move, and I watched a few videos from Dr Hertoghe above, who is quite clear coffee shouldn't be consumed for those interested in increasing testosterone.

I am typically a 2-3 cup a day drinker!

I didn't drink any coffee today, and I did notice I felt rather 'drawn' to several women I saw out. If this is happening after just 1 day without coffee, I am sure my sex organs are not completely dead lol. I also stopped the dutasteride. I am sure these things will heal in time!

I'll study some more of Dr Hertoghe's work. Also, I can begin working with Dr Robert Stevens, but I am conscious his recommendations are likely to be related to beginning TRT....Maybe not the road I want to go down just yet.

Best wishes,
Ravi

**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-306967>

Haha!!

So Jan, when it comes to getting testosterone levels in a good range, I am thinking lifestyle and nutrition will help me a lot. I do not think we will need things like TRT, though I have looked at Dr Hertoghe's videos and I am interested in exploring HGH therapy. I have contacted some clinics and will do some tests.

Do you think these approaches alone could bring my testosterone where we need it? I know Dr Hertoghe has commented on optimising testosterone naturally, and his recommendations are based on good diet and removing factors that crush testosterone (apparently coffee & alcohol are really bad for any hormone healing!).

The tests with Dr Stevens will be in January, and they will give a very useful baseline.

Dr Ettinger will have me on a program by then, and we can start rebuilding me to higher levels.

I do feel better since stopping the dutasteride and not drinking coffee. I do feel more interest in sex. I am not getting morning erections yet, but I did get a spontaneous erection today, and I also have a date with a lady in 3hrs which I am excited about. About 2 weeks ago, the hardness of my erections did begin to diminish, at which point I began to share more info on this log and that was what got me off the dutasteride.

It feels to me as if there is definitely a lot of healing potential inside me. And I would be very interested in learning how HGH therapy could help me. Dr Hertoghe is clearly a big fan and I am receptive to this, if my test shows low GH, perhaps this could help me....

Ravi

### Ravi Sandhu — 2021-12-05T16:04:52+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-307096>

Thanks Jan!

So, a week off the Dutasteride and coffee....and my sex drive is coming back.

Today, in the festive markets with my friends, and I totally did feel very drawn to women and plenty of raging interest.

My sex drive is not totally dead, it was there dormant waiting to come back once I stopped the dutasteride.

I think I will recover it well!

So I have scheduled a call with Dr Ettinger on Thursday who will design a program for me.

I have also booked the SpectraCell draw and a TRT Complete Plus draw with Dr Stevens.

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/), I got a call back from a clinic in London which does HGH therapy. They gave me the following breakdown:

Initial consultation, lab tests, and discussion of possible treatment plan if HGH levels are tested as low - £600

Then, if HGH levels need to be brought up, the treatment involves a monthly use of a HGH pen. The pen is £400.

They advised treatment lasts 3 months, and after that, the patients HGH levels are brought back up and they can move forward favourably.

In total, this clinic would charge £1800 for this treatment. That's quite pricey, of course, and I will consult widely and get a range of prices before exploring further.

But does this sound like a good approach to HGH treatment to you Jan? Is it only 3 months, and thereafter, the patient is able to move forward favourably with ample levels of growth hormone? This sounds a bit unusual to me. Hope you can offer some thoughts on this therapy.

Ravi

I can also report, I did have a morning erection today for the first time since the symptoms with dutasteride began.

### JanSz — 2021-12-31T15:50:09+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-308131>

What is cyanidin 3 glucoside?
The C3G Solution Cyanidin 3-glucoside is a naturally occurring compound that gives blueberries, blackberries, and black rice their characteristic color. Studies show C3G directly benefits fat-cell and muscle-cell function with positive effects on insulin signaling, selective insulin sensitivity, and glucose and nutrient management.

\------------------------------

Why is C3G such a potent AMPK activator?
Reason is, according to one study (Wei, X, et al.), C3G is a potent AMPK activator and thereby produces a downstream effect of increasing glucose and lipid update into myocytes (tubular cells inside our muscles).

...

Totally agree Jan. I am working hard at it. I have been on a few dates, for the first time, and was recently intimate with a great gal. That was my first time - at 30! Beating a difficult past of poor health and anxiety, now, I am moving forward.

My sex drive is still poor, and since using topical dutasteride, I did develop weak erections / erectile dysfunction. Spoke to Dr Marcus about it, who is helping me, and will speak to him fully next week.

Just going to keep healing!

I am doing CT almost daily, but I slacked on CT and took almost 2 months off. This was a mistake. Since reintroducing CT, my overall vitality is better.

Will endeavour to get more earthing in.

I am consuming DHA, almost daily, which is mission critical. If I miss a few days, the anxiety and stress levels just ramp up. There is obviously brain inflammation I need to bring down. But with regular DHA consumption, my head is clear.

Brain fog is almost a thing of the past. The supplement protocol yourself and Dr Marcus have me on has done WONDERS for my mental function. It is truly night and day. I am very productive and effective and my ability to speak, think, solve problems has increasing MASSIVELY. I am super grateful for this, but you know by now I am VERY driven and must get to optimal.....

Anxiety levels, again, have come down a lot. A LOT!!!! I attribute this mostly to the supplements and DHA.

I am using red lights, the Sperti device.

I will use my infrared sauna today, and when I'm back in London, I may find a local spot where I can use a traditional sauna a few times per week....

Right now, things have improved, and indeed, are improving. I will post my body composition on Monday, which will be a baseline for Feb 2022.

But the focus now must be on reclaiming sex drive, fixing ED, and becoming potent and vibrant again. As Jan eludes to, I am at the age now where I am seriously, seriously wanting to start a family.

In the past, I was sick, and this was not time for me to take my life's next steps. I saw it as selfish and inprudent. Plus, remember, I was 250lbs when I joined this community, of obese and anxious, brain foggy emotional trainwreck/mess of a human being.

We've come a long way.

But we will keep going until optimal.

I will also schedule a trip somewhere sunny and at a better latitude for a few weeks later this year.

I suppose the focus of my journal will now shift towards RECLAIMING SEX DRIVE & POTENCY

I am dating, I started dating at 30 years young!!! But there is nagging doubt about performance in the back of my mind which causes inner turmoil. I was dating one girl, and we had a great time, she was my first sexual partner ever and on my first time I was quite mind blown and actually ended up having sex for 4 hours. I have no idea how I did that, because the next week, I was totally unable to get an erection lol. And then, she was no longer interested in seeing me. I wished her well and we kept moving forward in our journey.

Obviously I don't blame here, I must resolve my sex drive and ED issues, and this is MY responsibility.

I will keep learning from the community here, Dr Jack, Dr Marcus, and I will keep taking action........

Now off for a 2hr walk in the sun with lots of skin exposure, will do some earthing along the way by kicking my boots off, and will come home and jump in the infrared sauna and get in front of the EMR-Tek Firewave for 30mins.

BTW, I am fasting today. My Dad checked my blood glucose about 2hrs ago. I had a cup of coffee with 2tsp of sugar about an hour before, and according to his device, my blood sugar was 5.9.

I will check it again later on. I am totally fasted, so I expect it'll be nice and low.

Tomorrow, following my fast today, I will do a spike day of calories. This can help kick start hormone production and has helped in the past.

Best wishes,
Ravi

Excerpt from that post where Epitalon is mentioned:
"One other thing: in the Khavinson studies, when it says they were using Epitalon and Thymalin at the same time, it doesn't mean they were using them at the same time; it could be you use Epitalon for three weeks, three months after you use the Thymalin, three months after you use the Epitalon again, and you rotate like that. It just meant taken at the same time in that yearly or study time frame. Now when I do design some long-term anti-aging program where I do rotations, I do that: I say 20 days of Epitalon, for example, and three months after another bioregulator, and Epitalon again etc. And you can do them more at the same time, but it doesn't have to be like today at the same time."

Epitalon acetate, 100 mg, $120

In the caption to this Facebook picture post

[https://www.facebook.com/BGFitness/...protocol-for-anti-aging-fo/10158630176829179/](https://www.facebook.com/BGFitness/photos/im-on-my-last-day-of-my-once-yearly-epithalon-peptide-protocol-for-anti-aging-fo/10158630176829179/)

Ben Greenfield wrote, "The Khavinson protocol is 10mg epithalon, administered 3 times a week for 3 weeks, and is the exact dose that was studied in a 15 year follow up longevity study in humans that produced impressive results for controlling telomere shortening. The protocol only needs to be done once yearly."

\_\_\_

Similar recommendations

[https://bengreenfieldlife.com/article/anti-aging-articles/how-to-use-peptides/](https://bengreenfieldlife.com/article/anti-aging-articles/how-to-use-peptides/)

"Here’s the recommended dosage instructions for Epitalon:

Dosage: 5-10mg per day

Frequency of injection: 1 injection per day for low dose, 2 injections per day for high dose (divided between morning and late afternoon). Injections for this and other peptides can be subcutaneous (under skin, usually by bellybutton).

Duration: 10-20 days

Repeat cycle: 1-2x/year"

\_\_\_

International Peptide Society Medical Professional Monograph Epithalon

[https://peptidesociety.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/07/Epithalon-Monograph-Final.pdf](https://peptidesociety.org/wp-content/uploads/2018/07/Epithalon-Monograph-Final.pdf)

"Dosage
\- IM \[intramuscular injection?\] General Dosing (Russian Protocol)
\- 100mg total
\- 10 mg IM daily for 10 days
\- Twice a Year

\- or IM General Dosing (Ukraine Protocol)
\- 50 mg total
\- Use 10 mg every third day times 2 weeks
\- Twice a year

Note these Are IM \[intramuscular injection?\] protocols, this is a small peptide and Currently IPS \[International Peptide Society, publisher of this document\] protocol is a sub- q \[subcutaneous injection?\] protocol

...

Epithalon induces telomerase activity and telomere elongation in human somatic cells. In a study it was shown to induce a 33% increase in telomere elongation which is directly involved in the aging process. \[9\] There was a human trial done over a 12-year period with patients treated with epithalon and a placebo group. The results of this study demonstrated a 28% decrease in overall mortality with those treated with epithalamin, and a 2-fold decrease in cardiovascular mortality by decreasing the functional age and degree of cardiovascular aging. \[10\] Another study was done to show that those treated with thymalin and epithalamin over a 6-year period had a mortality rate that was 4.1 times lower than the control group. \[11\]

\[9\] Epithalon Peptide induces Telomerase activity and Telomere elongation in Human somatic cells, Bulletin of Experimental Biology and Medicine,Vol 135,No.5,pp 692-695, June 2003

\[10\] Bull Exp Biol Med. 2006 Sep;142(3):356-9, Geroprotective effect of epithalamine (pineal gland peptide preparation) in elderly subjects with accelerated aging., Korkushko OV1, Khavinson VKh, Shatilo VB, Antonyuk-Shcheglova IA.

\[11\] Neuro Endocrinol Lett. 2003 Jun-Aug 24(3-4):233-40.,Peptides of pineal gland and thymus prolong human life.,Khavinson VKh1, Morozov VG."

\_\_\_

Reconstituting peptide powder with water and dosing with an insulin syringe
(Scroll to "How to get BPC-157" section)

[https://bengreenfieldlife.com/article/supplements-articles/how-to-use-bpc-157/](https://bengreenfieldlife.com/article/supplements-articles/how-to-use-bpc-157/)

\_\_\_

Khavinson's main publications
[https://khavinson.info/research/main-published](https://khavinson.info/research/main-published)

\_\_\_

"Vladimir Khavinson" search on libgen; 24 studies
[https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Vladimir+Khavinson](https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Vladimir+Khavinson)

\_\_\_

### Dan2 — 2022-03-19T22:58:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-311289>

"Which one to choose?
How to monitor if it makes any difference?
\---------------------------------------
Spectracel does telomere testing, is it worth to do that tests?"

I don't know why Ben Greenfield made the different recommendations; it's probably considering Khavinson's dosages in his experiments, what people self-experimenting discuss on peptides or anti-aging etc discussion forums that I'm not aware of specifically but Ben Greenfield probably reads, and probably discussions with doctors he knows who offer peptide treatments and have experience with results of their patients from different protocols. I don't know more about it other than the transcripts of some podcasts about peptides that I have in my journal thread (that I linked to the mentions of Epitalon in those).

In my previous post:
"Epithalon induces telomerase activity and telomere elongation in human somatic cells. In a study it was shown to induce a 33% increase in telomere elongation which is directly involved in the aging process. \[9\]

\[9\] Epithalon Peptide induces Telomerase activity and Telomere elongation in Human somatic cells, Bulletin of Experimental Biology and Medicine,Vol 135,No.5,pp 692-695, June 2003"

This is that study:
[https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Epithal...nd+Telomere+elongation+in+Human+somatic+cells](https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Epithalon+Peptide+induces+Telomerase+activity+and+Telomere+elongation+in+Human+somatic+cells)

That's **with cell cultures, where the "shown to induce a 33% increase in telomere elongation" is from**.

From that study:
"These results indicate that in human somatic cells Epithalon can induce the expression of telomerase enzyme component, telomerase activity, and telomere longation (by on average 33.3%). Hence, we for the first time demonstrated induction of telomerase activity with a peptide. These data largely explain the geroprotective effects of Epithalon in various experimental models \[10\]. It is known that critically short telomeres cannot prevent chromosome fusion, which can lead to activation of protooncogenes and malignant transformation \[7\], while activation of telomerase and telomere elongation under the effect of the peptide explain the mechanism of antitumor effect of Epithalon in old animals."

So because the 33% telomere length increase claim is from a cell culture study, yeah, might be useful to do a telomere test after Epitalon protocol to see how it affects yours.

I thought maybe there'll be more about telomeres in the **12-year study Khavinson did**; there isn't more about telomeres, but I did find **a dosing protocol, and there's some interesting details about cardiovascular health and melatonin normalization**.

(Continuing in that paragraph from my previous post)
"There was a human trial done over a 12-year period with patients treated with epithalon and a placebo group. The results of this study demonstrated a 28% decrease in overall mortality with those treated with epithalamin, and a 2-fold decrease in cardiovascular mortality by decreasing the functional age and degree of cardiovascular aging. \[10\]

\[10\] Bull Exp Biol Med. 2006 Sep;142(3):356-9, Geroprotective effect of epithalamine (pineal gland peptide preparation) in elderly subjects with accelerated aging., Korkushko OV1, Khavinson VKh, Shatilo VB, Antonyuk-Shcheglova IA."

Here's that study:
[https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Geroprotective+effect+of+epithalamine+(pineal+gland+peptide+preparation)+in+elderly](https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Geroprotective+effect+of+epithalamine+%28pineal+gland+peptide+preparation%29+in+elderly)

(quoting from it)
"Epithalamine (ET) is one of the first peptide preparations in the world medical practice, which exhibited high geroprotective efficiency and safety in experimental and clinical studies. Epithalamine is a complex of polypeptides with molecular weights of 1-10 kDa isolated from the pineal gland and containing no melatonin \[7,9\]. The preparation stimulates the function of pinealocytes and increases melatonin production by these cells \[3,11\]. **The effect of ET on the function of the pineal gland seems to be very important, because age-related weakening of the melatonin producing function has a significant impact on the body in general**: leads to age-specific disorganization of biological rhythms, disorders in wake-sleeping cycle, neuroendocrine regulation, immunity, reproductive function, stress resistance, and promotes carcinogenesis \[1,2\].

...**Pineal gland peptides induce telomerase activity and reduce the incidence of chromosome aberrations, which seems to promote slower realization of the genetic program of aging** **\[6,8,13\]**...

\[**References about telomeres**...

\[6\] S. V. Rosenfeld, E. F. Togo, V. S. Mikheyev, et al., Effect of Epithalon on the Incidence of Chromosome Aberrations in Senescence-Accelerated Mice, Bulletin of Experimental Biology and Medicine, 133, No. 3, 320-322 (2002).
[https://link.springer.com/article/10.1023/A:1015899003974](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1023/A:1015899003974)
[https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Effect+...me+Aberrations+in+Senescence-Accelerated+Mice](https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Effect+of+Epithalon+on+the+Incidence+of+Chromosome+Aberrations+in+Senescence-Accelerated+Mice)

\[8\] V. Kh. Khavinson, S. V. Anisimov, V. V. Malinin, and V. N. Anisimov, Peptide Regulation of Genome and Aging \[in Russian\], Moscow (2005).

\[13\] **V. Kh. Khavinson and V. V. Malinin, Gerontological Aspects of Genome Peptide Regulation**, Basel (2005).
[https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Gerontological+Aspects+of+Genome+Peptide+Regulation](https://libgen.is/scimag/?q=Gerontological+Aspects+of+Genome+Peptide+Regulation)

From a review of it, "**The monograph \[**Gerontological Aspects of Genome Peptide Regulation\]** consists of 10 rather short but very informative chapters.**" ([https://sci-hub.se/10.1007/s10541-005-0245-6](https://sci-hub.se/10.1007/s10541-005-0245-6))

Table of contents and preface: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085302](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085302)
Chapter 1: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085301](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085301)
Chapter 2: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085303](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085303)
Chapter 3: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085304](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085304)
Chapter 4: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085313](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085313)
Chapter 5: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085314](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085314)
Chapter 6: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085316](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085316)
Chapter 7: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085319](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085319)
Chapter 8: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085320](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085320)
Chapter 9: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085321](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085321)
Chapter 10: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085322](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085322)
Chapter 11 Conclusion: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085323](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085323)
Index: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085325](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085325)
References: [https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085324](https://sci-hub.se/10.1159/000085324) \]

Clinical studies of the efficiency and safety of **long-term treatment with ET were carried out in 1992-2004 by scientists of Institute of Gerontology, Academy of Medical Sciences of the Ukraine**... The efficiency of ET was evaluated in a thoroughly selected population of rapidly aging elderly subjects, representing an adequate object for evaluation of geroprotective treatments... **Higher functional age in comparison with calendar age was considered as the criterion of AA \[accelerated aging\]** \[2\]. The examined patients suffered mainly from the cardiovascular variant of AA. This was seen from a **significantly greater (by 10 and more years) functional age of the cardiovascular system CVS) in comparison with actual age**. Other manifestations (syndromes) of AA were also present: autonomic dysregulation, immune system dysfunction, decreased blood levels of sex hormones below the age-specific norm, reduction of physical and mental working capacity and of compactness and mineral saturation of bone tissue, disorders in lipid and carbohydrate metabolism, reduction of the detoxicating function of the liver, increased functional age of the CNS and of structural and functional age of bone tissue, etc...

The patients were examined before ET or placebo treatment, after the 1st course of treatment, every year during the first 3 years, and then 5, 8, 10, and 12 years after the starting of ET \[Epitalon\] treatment.

**The protocol of long-term treatment with ET suggested therapeutic courses every 6 months for 3 years. Each course consisted of 5 intramuscular injections of ET in a dose of 10 mg with 3-day intervals. The dose per course was 50 mg, total dose over 3 years was 300 mg. Epithalamine was injected at 10.00 \[AM?; I'm guessing this is like military time and would be 22.00 if 10 PM\], as it was experimentally proven that injection of the drug at this time of the day best of all stimulated the melatonin-producing function of the pineal gland** \[11\].

Elderly patients in **the main and control groups received the same basic therapy, including daily preventive dose of aspirin (100-125 mg), daily nitrosorbide (20-30 mg), low-dose β-adrenoblocker (propranolol, 20-30 mg), and/or angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitor (captopril, 25-50 mg)**.

**After the first 3 courses of ET therapy, the functional age of CVS decreased by 3.2±1.5 years**. Subsequent courses (4-6) promoted stabilization of the attained favorable effect (Fig. 1). **By the end of 3-year observation the functional age of CVS in the main group virtually did not differ from the initial values, despite the fact the actual age of the patients increased by 3 years during this period**... As early as after the first course of ET elderly subjects could walk a longer distance (by 254±73 m) along the terrain cure route without stopping and noted lesser fatigue during the exercise. The results of bicycle ergometry confirmed increased physical performance ability (Fig. 2). **The threshold exercise tolerance increased by 21% under the effect of ET. This was paralleled by increase in the maximum O2 consumption during performance of the threshold exercise (by 0.11± 0.05 ml min), indicating increased functional potential of the oxygen transporting system**...

One of the mechanisms of favorable effect on physical working capacity was improvement of the efficiency of the CVS functioning (economic work). **Heart rate and systolic blood pressure decreased significantly at the peak of dosed (25 W) exercise (by 7±3 bpm and by 9.4 mm Hg, respectively), while stroke volume increased by 12±4 ml, indicating decreased energy expenditure of the heart. Epithalamine had a favorable impact on the autonomic regulation**. The treatment promoted a decrease in the low-frequency component and increase in the intensity of high-frequency component of **heart rhythm variability**, **that is, decreased the sympathetic** and increased the influences on CVs. **This restructuring of autonomic regulation provides more effective functioning of the CVS during exercise**...

**The favorable impact of ET on aging organism is partially due to its normalizing effect on the melatonin-producing function of the pineal gland** \[3\]. Epithalamine stimulated endogenous production of melatonin in patients with initially low function of pinealocytes: plasma hormone concentration moderately increased during the dark hours of the day (Table 1). Injection of ET to patients with retained melatonin-producing function of the pineal gland virtually did not suppress the production of endogenous melatonin. Therefore, prescription of ET does not require preliminary evaluation of the pineal gland function.

"

### caroline — 2022-03-20T23:59:14+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-311322>

I was just reading back thru this journal

can I make a suggestion from a female point of view?

I am meaning no disrespect at all - I totally appreciate and respect your journey here .....

My perspective for a male or female .....it can't just be about how you look.

You have to love yourself before someone else can love you.

This is an inside job!

Maybe you are trying to hard?

Maybe just go on with your life - doing the things that interest you, things that make your spirit soar, things that resonate with your heart, things that give you substance and soul and make you glow with satisfaction..

In my opinion - all these inside things show on the outside far more than what exercise you are doing to improve your abs.

It is almost never about what someone looks like on the outside - it is always about what is on the inside.

Have you ever seen a beautiful woman with a very average looking guy and wonder why she is attracted to him?

I will guarantee you that it is all about kindness, and decency and compassion and a great love of life in whatever form that takes.

Personally I think the right person comes along when you least expect it, when you are living your life to the max, when you are loving yourself ....then you sparkle with vitality and vigor.

Who could resist that .........

I am pretty sure that Jack would tell you that being best friends first is a precursor to a great love.

Relax and enjoy the journey........

### JanSz — 2022-03-23T15:23:18+0200

Ravi;
Life is really arranged around procreation.
After we got babies our body is relatively useless from life continuation pov.
But, we want to live as long as possible.
One (major) indicator of good overall health is the ability to have sex. Man has an indicator that tells you where you are.
If you can't have an erection, you are sick. Plain and simple.
You can make a large correction by supplementing with testosterone (and other details).
Problem is that supplemental testosterone would suppress your LH and FSH hormones.
Lack of FSH will make you sterile.
That is the reason why until you have all the babies that you want, you have a problem using supplemental testosterone.
So,
if you have good working testicles
and they are not producing enough testosterone you may have (secondary hypogonadism)
low LH and FSH
or low LH and ok FSH
you should clarify your situation.
Get tested for

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-04-26T10:46:22+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-312493>

THANKS FOLKS

So, the work we've done is great. I am feeling good these days, calm, sharp and confident.

Libido is good. Some days it's really banging, other day's it's chill.

Furthermore, the weird part of me that felt broken isn't how I feel now. I CAN get a connection with women now. Girls who I have attracted do want me and it is not like it was before when I was in a haze.

Now women do want to be around me, and as I mentioned, in the past few weeks I have had one who ended up in my bedroom a few times.

We had a lot of fun but I was unable to get an erection, and ultimately, that was a problem for her as she felt I wasn't attracted to her. So we amicably remained friends but we don't see each other now

[@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) so I did take your advice and appreciate it. For this one, the lady did want physical intimacy and more to the point, penetrative sex with a hard penis not my floppy one lol. She was awesome but right now, I am not able to support her needs and as such, this wouldn't be fair on her. We're friends but that's that now

So....last night a lady from a while ago re-entered my life. Honestly, she saw my recent physique photos on Instagram and was quite open that she wanted sex.

She came right over, and guess what? I couldn't get an erection last night. No surprise.

We had fun and I enjoyed myself. I have come so far. I truly have.

Just need to resolve this final piece of the puzzle.

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) I will take some action on getting the yoghurt into my diet. Thank you Jan. I also purchased the cialis pills. I will take half the 20mg pill daily. I also am doing the following to increase NO:

\-Organic Beetroot Powder 2 x Tablespoons in water 3 x a day
\-This supplement: [5 pills a day for L-Arginine](https://www.amazon.co.uk/Black-Maca-Root-Complex-5000mg/dp/B089C1FL52/ref=sr_1_2_sspa?keywords=black+maca&qid=1650959112&sprefix=black+maca%2Caps%2C194&sr=8-2-spons&psc=1&spLa=ZW5jcnlwdGVkUXVhbGlmaWVyPUE5RExZSUZYWlcxRVQmZW5jcnlwdGVkSWQ9QTA4Mzk4NzAzUUhMQTBDWFNINldMJmVuY3J5cHRlZEFkSWQ9QTAxMDI3MTMyU1FNSzRJUjUxRlRHJndpZGdldE5hbWU9c3BfYXRmJmFjdGlvbj1jbGlja1JlZGlyZWN0JmRvTm90TG9nQ2xpY2s9dHJ1ZQ==)

I am now going to go for a run. I think I also may need some time off training as I train hard. I think I will take 2 weeks off training as of next week and see if this helps my ED?

Today:
\-60 min run in the park
\-1hr CT
\-Earthing in the park (30m)
\-Tinned salmon, tinned mackeral
\-1hr Meditation

Any other ideas for beating ED folks, and I am all ears.

This is my last issue and when this has been defeated, this Black Swan will fly into the sunset.

RAVI

BLACK SWAN LIFE UPDATE

MY LIBIDO AND ERECTIONS RETURNED IN A MAJOR WAY

So, 2 days ago, sat pondering and thinking how one earth I am going to figure this out, my intuition pulled me in the direction of my systems and body perhaps not playing ball as I have been dieting and restricting myself for so long

In paticular, I've been strict keto, and eating quite low kcal

SO, I thought: what if I increase my kcal, add carbs back in. I wonder what will happen?

I am googling "low carb and testosterone" and find some sources that highlight how low calorie diets put the body in starvation mode and shut down sexual function

I know all of this, obviously, I have been researching for so long

But in particular, I found some information which suggested low carb diets can give some erectile dysfunction

That was enough for me to go carb crazy for 2 days

And geuss what?

On day 2, and I mean within 24 hours, I have absolutely RAGING ERECTIONS ALL DAY

I strike while the iron is got and also begin applying Progest-E from kenogen to my balls/scrotum, 2 x a day

And I am doing CT, eating DHA, taking my NO supplements, doing it ALL

I have cialis now. And it's date night Wednesday 27th.

She comes back with me. I am fretting about my ED. But this time, it's different.

Clothes come off and FINALLY, I'VE GOT AN ERECTION

This has taken me almost a god damn year of hard work as a mitochondriac, but WOW

I am putting my condom on just thinking, my god, the work I put in for this - week in, week out, and it's here

The cialis is also kicking in

Sex is great, come 3 times, just had a blast

And we really connect. She comes back over Friday. We have a great night. She's also into nature. We have great sex Friday, and spend ALL DAY Saturday in the park, earthing, laying on the grass, getting sun

Life's good.

I didn't take any cialis Saturday obviously and had erections ALL DAY with her. Raging, rock hard, just crazy.

TAKE HOME POINTS
\-I RECOVERED FROM MY ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION
\-FOUNDATION WAS MITOCHONDRIAC WORK
\-FINAL TOUCHES WERE INCREASING KCAL AND ALSO, ADDING CARBS BACK TO THE DIET

Now to enjoy my sex drive for some time.

There we have it.

I have progressed SO FAR and overcome so many of my challenges.

Now I have a great gal to enjoy life with, have good health and function, and am feeling strong and happy, I will enjoy this for a while.

Then I am going to turn my entire focus to business, making money, and becoming location independent to free myself from the system, move away from the UK and live a true Black Swan life in the sun, connected to nature

I will keep working at everything, but my friends, I am doing well now. My problems have been solved.

It is now just a journey to OPTIMAL

I will probably change the name of this journal now because we have achieved the transformation I wanted

I LOST 52LBS
I BEAT ANXIETY AND BRAIN FOG
I BUILT MY BODY UP
I OVERCAME ERECTILE DYSFUNCTION AND SEXUAL ISSUES

AND LIFE IS ABUNDANT

ANYTHING IS POSSIBLE

Ravi

### Sharon Coste — 2022-06-01T22:54:45+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-313293>

Ravi,

Do you still take iodine? I took it back in March & April my first 2 months of my complete overhaul of food, light, water & magnetism. I wasn't sure if it was helping much of anything and I was doing so many new things and getting overwhelmed by what I should or should not be supplementing. One of the things I stopped was the iodine. I was making progress on my anxiety and panic attacks, my mood and how I was thinking and feeling but that all went to hell and I'm again trying to figure out what else I need to do or supplement. So I ask, do you believe Iodine has been an integral part of your healing journey and do you still take it daily? Forgive me if I sound a bit confusing, I struggle so much to write my thoughts/words clear and concise again lately.

> [Ravi Sandhu said:](/goto/post?id=303943)
>
> I see. I will bring that temp up! I have done some further research into iodine since you recommended this tip Jan, and frankly, I am quite amazed.
>
> [https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/11264481/](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/11264481/)
>
> A deficiency in iodine can, in this study, cause a decrease of IQ by 10-15 points.
>
> I did some more digging, and found a book by Lynne Farrow, a lady who reversed her deep brain fog through iodine therapy.
>
> I use the J CROW stuff in my morning coffee, but I had a bottle of lugols iodine from another manufacturer laying around, and used about 15 drops on my skin. Suddenly, hands became warm and mind became alert and focused, concentration and focus feels better and thoughts are flowing easier.
>
> The case studies I have found when doing research (I use DuckDuckGo for health research Google is awful) when typing 'Iodine brain fog' are really compelling.
>
> I have a low morning temp, which may suggest low thyroid function, so I am very interested in exploring this further. I will keep doing the J CROW iodine in my morning coffee, along with 20 drops of selenium that Jan posted above (I purchased that earlier) and 7 drops of the vit D under the tongue. But I have ordered some Iodoral to see how I get along with it.
>
> I am telling you my thinking does feel clearer just from using these drops on my skin.
>
> Through Light, Water Magnetism I am overall functioning far better than I have in a long time, but some small anxiety and brain fog lingers. I am very curious what will happen with some of the work I am currently doing on my journey to optimal.
>
> I ordered Lynne Farrow's book for my Kindle (don't worry I will read it outside lol) and will report back any interesting findings.....
>
> I have been outdoors in my garden today in the sun, doing some writing, I wrote an article for my website and facebook group and now just reading the aforementioned book, after a few hrs of reading this I will go on to reading Robert Becker's The Body Electric, I still need to really strengthen my understanding of the Quantum Biologic viewpoint but don't worry I am applying myself and I will get there,
>
> Feeling good!
>
> Ravi

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-07-03T13:22:05+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-314078>

Dear friends I have returned!

And like all journeys, mine has not come without ups and downs, the seekers path is always marked by waves of successes, and subsequent challenges to ones resolve

I increased my carb intake, the libido returned, and I began to finally get over my ED. I found myself a great gal who loves the outdoors and we've been having a great time since. It has become apparent we're on different trajectories in life, so we're not together as such, but the companionship and sex is great and we see each other once or twice a week, hike together, spend time outdoors, etc.

The problem of my 'dead dick' and having no conneciton with others as such was resolved.

My libido came back and life was good.

I stopped CT. I stopped watching the sunrise. I stopped eating DHA.

I got my carbs in, and was doing fine.

Until I wasn't.

Body composition began to take a turn for the worst. I gained 15lbs like it was NOTHING, from 197 to 215 practically in a few weeks.

Then the fatigue, brain fog, poor cognition returned.

Was on a date with my lady and just didn't want to be there, could barely think.

I persisted and pushed through, until last week, while I was working in London, my brain function was so bad I couldn't literally do anything. I went home, locked myself in my room for days and just thought how in the hell am I going to get myself right?????

I can't think, I am falling behind on work, and this is getting challenging. I even had one night of ED with my girl, but then was fine since.

If I eat carbs, I can get erections and have libido, but I gain weight crazy fast and then crash and become a god damn zombie.

If I eat Epi-Paleo RX style, I can function, get on in life, but then the libido just dies and erectile dysfunction sets in again.

How am I supposed to live like this?!?

Few weeks of amazing function, crushing it in life

Then just DESTROYED

I had to go back to basics..............

Got some time off work, got the train back from Londo, checked in with my parents in their home and fired up my laptop and went straight to Dr Jack's blog.

I am NOT going to live like this. I have worked my god damn ass off to get further on in life and my journey and I CANNOT FUCKING FAIL at this.

The future I have sacrified for is at stake.

So as of Friday, I went back to the basics. I am still anxious as hell in brain and body, and I am not back to an even keel yet. But I will turn this situation around like I did and really heal myself or die trying.

Yesterday I did a lot of earthing, ate plenty of DHA, watched the sunset, and just relaxed in bed as I was terribly tired and anxious. Drank lots of non-floridated water.

Today so far:

\-Got uip and watched the sunrise in my parents garden, grounded, 448-515 am. Went back to bed in a darkened room until 9am. Was too tired t stay up.
\-Got up, made breakfast which was a tin of red salmon and some rice cooked in coconut oil. Went in the garden in my shorts and did grounding for 1hr.

Now going to do lots of stretching and postural work, drink lots of good RO water, and then do CT for 30 mins.

Have some life admin tasks, some work, and then a family event.

But will watch the sunset, do lots of grounding, eat DHA, and get another 30min CT session in before bed.

I will attack this and start recharging thiis damn battery. Brain function like this is not acceptable.

I also booked 2 weeks to see my friend in Budapest where I will be at latitude 47 and outdoors a tonne, with plenty of heat and sunshine.

Ravi

It is there but it is at near low laboratory limits.

Check your Growth Hormone, that may help.

GH
IGF-1
IGF-BP3

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-07-03T16:20:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-314082>

Still working. Been outdoors for hours, stretching, doing movement work, and listening to Dr K.

Just ate a bunch of DHA. Salmon burgers, which are processed and not idea tbh. But then a tin of achovies. Ate a tinned of quality salmon this morning. This is a good level of DHA IMO.

After many hours of grounding, I began to simmer down, calm down, feel more positive and more motivated.

This is why I am fundamentally a mitochondriac, because when I do the practices which raise the redox potential of the body, I do feel better.

I am just needing the consistency, and to bring all these factors together in a manner which will solve my problem of sickness and not being where I want to be.

Which is vital, industrious, high level, able to produce a lot and at scale, and happy, connected, having a good social and sex life (which is right there for the taking at this stage) and realising my human potential.

I am determined as hell and won't quit....

I am now going to do 15 more mins of earthing, then go do 30mins of CT. It's cold bath, with ice blocks added. It's not even hard for me anymore. I can tolerate it no problem. Lay back and listen to Dr K.

With lots of DHA, with lots of light, my body will start to produce DC electric current. That will restore this nervous system and bring clarity and thinking ability I need to suceed in my goals, endeavours, and ultimately build the location independent business I want to build so I can get out of here and go live with nature.

I feel better than I did this morning, I was fricken tired. I feel furiously motivated now.....Grounding is GOOD!

Will keep working, go to this family party, and then do more grounding, watch the sunset, and get another 30min CT session in.

I refuse to believe I have to live the rest of my life with a body composition I do not want (I want to be lean and toned, and I was until this month where I piled back on!) and without the high level clarity and thinking ability I once had. I want it back. And I will use it to free myself and do good in the world.

Ravi

DH is hacking eating food in order, veges, then protein and fats and carbs last. The main result so far is that whereas before he had to eat 3 meals a day at regular intervals and never missed breakfast, he has missed breakfast completely, and several times had it hours later than normal, really easily, and regularly compresses his eating window by 2 or 3 hours. Think he's also lost some weight but hasn't weighed himself or measured his waist.

I'm doing the same, but have taken it up a notch with regular dietary uncouplers. Metformin is an uncoupler, but the dietary uncouplers have been used for centuries and don't present the same hassles as trying to get metformin in the UK without a prescription. If I can't or don't get NIR from the environment in sufficient quantities, or don't produce it in my mitochondria by doing CT, the strong dietary uncouplers (as signalling molecules, either direct or produced by the microbiome) may be a work round, or more accurately a work with ....

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-07-04T11:26:41+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-314108>

Yesterday really charged my body and brain. Hours of grounding, lots of DHA, CT, and watched sunrise.

Hours and hours of this, focused effort, and I began to feel better.

The family wedding has been a week long effort. Thurs night there’s a pre-party, Sat there’s religious ceremonies, and Sunday there’s a big party to wrap up.

Thursday I felt like hell. Anxious, so stressed, tired, I was like a robot and could barely speak.

I was so pissed off I was like this for my cousins wedding. It pissed me off to no end.

But it gave me the motivation to really get my black swan mentality back to where I need it.

Friday I began reading Dr K’s blogs again, reminding me of the life saving concepts I need to keep at the forefront of my mind.

Saturday, I was still so anxious, feeling horrible, but just pushed through. The ceremony wasn’t something I could enjoy because I felt like hell.

But it wrapped up at about 3pm so I could spend time earthing, consuming DHA and doing what needs to be done.

Sunday, I detailed my activities in the last post.

AND I CAME TO LIFE FOR THE FINAL PARTY

My goodness, I went into that party just a different person. Social, confident, calm, and ready to enjiy and have a great time

I had energy, I had confidence, I have social exuberant vital energy and wanted to use it and be high in spirits. Danced all night, just endlessly, had power, strength, and just vitality.

I was on the dancefloor with my whole family around me, the drinks were flowing like crazy, and I just thought to myself, I cannot believe the contrast between how I am now and how I was just on Thursday

THIS IS WHY I AM A MITOCHONDRIAC

This works and this is what will get me to where I need to be

I must keep consuming DHA, find ways to do earthing for 1-2hrs a day, keep doing CT 30 mins a day minimum, preferable 2 x 30, see sunrise, sunset, and embody the winning black swan mentality.

If I can feel THIS MUCH DIFFERENT in just a few days, from what felt like deep sickness and decay, to having more energy and confidence, vibration and function than most people around me, even if it was just a high from the occasion, I cannot be THAT sick?!

Healing myself and getting to the next level cannot be that far away.

My body MUST be on my side, wanting to heal, wanting to achieve my goals. It is telling me to lean in and trust Dr K & the work we do here

Back to London this afternoon. I will do some CT, ground for 2-4hrs, eat lots of DHA, and I am seeing my lady. Fingers crossed my willy works lol.......oh god....

Proscar, propecia --- 5aR inhibitor

nizarol shampoo----->>>**KETOCONAZOLE
Bad news, may be a reason for your low testosterone.

Ravi,
I think that you believe that only when you are buff, ripped, low body fat, etc. will women find you attractive. True, a small percentage of women may prefer or seek out the image of perfection, but in my experience, they want someone kind, honest, and sincere and are not seeking a Hollywood star. My wife prefers me at 205lbs, I prefer 15 less. Would you prefer a partner who is physically perfect but always looking in a mirror or one who has some imperfections but puts your relationship first, and loves herself. I feel like if you could relax and really get to know someone, your performance issues might solve themselves. We are all imperfect. Love who you are now while making changes, don't wait till you're perfect.
Good luck.
Oh yeah, have you tried any pork in Budapest. They have a variety of pig there, the Mangalitsa, that is amazing.

> I am also starting to consider TRT again. I will see what my lab test results are like. And if I need TRT, I may consider it. Only thing is, I want to move abroad next year, and I wonder how I will be able to get treatment in such circumstances.
>
> Ravi

Remember, supplemental testosterone will
suppress your FSH and makes you (mostly) infertile.
It suppresses your LH and on the longer time will shrink your testicles and scrotum to nothing.
So, if you want to use testosterone it is good idea to use it with some amount of HCG.
HCG mimics LH.

Continuing
it is good idea to try HCG only as a first try.

\-----------------------------------------
Minoxidil is used to treat severely high blood pressure (hypertension)

...............................
Overall, no matter what you use,
it is good idea to do DUTCHtest.com
to see where your hormones are.

..............................................

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-08-10T22:28:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-314973>

> [JanSz said:](/goto/post?id=314966)
>
> Remember, supplemental testosterone will
> suppress your FSH and makes you (mostly) infertile.
> It suppresses your LH and on the longer time will shrink your testicles and scrotum to nothing.
> So, if you want to use testosterone it is good idea to use it with some amount of HCG.
> HCG mimics LH.
>
> Continuing
> it is good idea to try HCG only as a first try.
>
> \-----------------------------------------
> Minoxidil is used to treat severely high blood pressure (hypertension)
>
> ...............................
> Overall, no matter what you use,
> it is good idea to do DUTCHtest.com
> to see where your hormones are.
>
> ..............................................

Thanks for the post, Jan.

The TRT clinic I was looking at has all their clients use HCG. I do want kids, obviously as I've made clear before. From what I've read, TRT and use of HCG should offset fertility issues. This will only be explored if my upcoming tests show I have low T still, after all my work on myself.

Minox is safer than Fin and Dutasteride. I don't have issues with blood presure. So think I'll be OK.

My DUTCH test was a weird experience. It gave us some good info, and made it clear my body is converting testosterone to estrogen very prominently. This was a concern, but since then, I've been on a solid protocol of the classic black swan mitochondriac concepts, keto, and exercise.

I am functioning better than I used to. In particular, my time in Budapest was very noticeably healing, and to heal further, I am leaving the UK next year. Certainly London which is EMF hell in my opinion.

I will do some tests, and we can explore. I am also happy to do another DUTCH test.

I am going to hold off the use of fin or minox until we have these test results. If I am STILL low testosterone, then it may be time for TRT & HCG. I am going to work super hard next year and focus on travel and building myself up financially. I'm 31 right now. By 34, I do want to be in a serious relationship wuth a view towards having kids at age 35/36.

Time is of the essence and I am working DAILY to heal myself and to set myself up for the future I want.

Lots of work to be done.

I am doing the hair transplant to improve my outer appearance. I know other Black Swans have encouraged me to be cognizant of the need to look deeper, and that beauty is in the eye of the beholder. I appreciate your thoughts.

But know the world is becoming very superficial. In 2017, 70-80% of couples surveyed met through online dating. Online dating, I assure you, is a blood bath of superficiality. Many will not get a fair shake, and this is now the norm for meeting people. Meeting people in real life is considered weird now. It's nts.

Is what it is. I will need to do the hair transplant, will need to keep working out and getting my body composition where I need it, and will need to keep working on being the best person I can be. This is how it goes in today's world. The market for human bonding is totally unregulated and social media and the dating apps have encouraged superficial thinking because anyone with a phone is now in the meat market........

Consider the 25/30 dates I had from Jan to April before I met the lady I'm with. All of these dates were just flash in the pan, we met for a drink, we both went home (not together, there was no sex or anything) and that was just that. I texted all of them but only heard from 5, all of whom told me they felt no connection.

And then around April time, I'd lost more weight, gained more muscle, and the girls I would go on dates with received me differently. One has stuck around and now I don't have to bother with all this nonsense.

That is how superficial it is I'm afraid.

Ravi

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-08-19T07:52:33+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-315134>

I have thought about what was said from the members above. I see how strongly [@caroline](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/888/) disagrees, and I respect this because ultimately Caroline has made it work and I have not....YET. Furthermore, it is worth highlighting I am not well yet. I am carrying some jadedness and trauma no doubt, and the more I heal my brain and body, the more I can go back to the light from which I came.

[@jrobertson1984](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/24954/): My willpower is thermonuclear I am a very, very driven person. I want the function and brain power I had at 20 years old back & will die trying. I have a solid work ethic am consistent and stop at nothing to achieve my goals.

I have been getting good results with fasting and will do a 3 day water fast next week to clean out my system.

OVERALL THOUGHTS

Well, sex drive has been quite good lately. It's great news. This is proof that you can fully recover from using dutasteride. I do have to do CT, see the sunrise, sunset, earth, and train with weights, as well as run. I am on a keto diet and while I am not producing ketones (test strips are never purple) I will keep working and enter ketosis eventually. And then the next phase of healing will begin. I'm consuming DHA.

If I do all these things, I feel better and do better.

I am happy about that, but I must say, fasting has given me marked cognitive benefits. It's helped me with calmness and clarity and assertiveness.

I am learning a lot from Dr Ettinger and Dr Courtney Hunt who advocate these things, as well as the other stuff we all know. Mitochondriacs are pretty much on the same page.

I AM IN ISTANBUL RIGHT NOW

I am getting hair transplant surgery done today. This is a gift to myself. I have lost 50lbs since starting this journey, and am coming back to the light. I want to look healthy and vibrant and am looking forward to restoring my hair.

After some consideration, I will experiment with topical finasteride (low dose) and minoxidil. This is after I had HORRIBLE side effects from taking topical dutasteirde at 0.1% (strong dose) as well as using nizarol shampoo. I stopped all of this following the advice of [@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) and [@DrEttinger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22307/) and was able to recover my libido, beat erectile dysfunction (a truly maddening condition) and proceed with my healing journey.

I am of course worried that I will get those problems again. But I am also far deeper into healing now and am stronger and more vibrant than I was when I was using dutasteride. I have the tools to maintain and build health and function. to strengthen my biology, and I am proven to execute them daily.

\-Sunrise
\-Earthing
\-CT (20 mins daily)
\-Time outdoors
\-Sunset
\-DHA daily
\-Exercise: Resistance training 3 x a week
\-Cardio: 60 mins 2 x a week
\-Speti (15m)

I will shore up all holes in my regime and keep working.

We will see how I get on with topical fin & minox as opposed to dutasteride. [@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) do you think I will fare better this time?

I will also order some lab tests next week when I'm back in the UK so we can do more digging.

I think the next things that will help me a lot are:

\-Cleaning the body out - periodic 3 day water fasts, plus 1 fast every week
\-Getting into ketosis - I am eating low carb but I have not entered ketosis yet. Once I am getting into ketosis, I think my body will heal a lot

Ravi

### JanSz — 2022-08-19T16:39:40+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-315137>

finasteride, dutasteride (Avodart)

You must do **blood testing** and **DUTCH test** when using any of them.
Look up where your DHT is.

There is a thing called
Post Finasteride Syndrome (PFS)
totally not pretty.
**You would rather be bald then having PFS.**

I suspect that PFS is due to lowering DHT too much.

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-08-20T07:21:06+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-315153>

OK folks - I have read & reflected.

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/): Don't I know it, my goodness, dutasteride gave me this problem and it was horrible. I bust my ass training 5 x a week, watching the sunrise, doing CT daily to restore myself. DHA & earthing daily. And I recovered. It took 9 months of hard work and it was very upsetting having erectile dysfunction and no libido! I was able to get my sex drive back and erections back but I worked hard at it.

[@Dr. Marcus Ettinger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22755/): Sounds good Doc, we will get together and discuss the next steps. For the forum, it was studying Dr Ettinger's patreon and repeating the behaviours daily that helped me get over the nightmarish problems I had. Whilst I have some way to go, I do have a lady in my life and our sex life is good. She had to be patient for many months while I was healing and then I began to function again and it was a good, good day let me tell you....

I am fearful of these sexual sides coming back, but I also really want to get a presentable head of hair. I had hair transplant surgery yesterday at an excellent clinic in Istanbul, the surgeon came highly reccomended and they were consumate professionals.

I had a good donor area, so they were able to remove 2746 grafts from the 'safe' areas which are relatively DHT resistant and implant them into my front to give a full hairline reconstruction, along the mid scalp to increase density, and they had enough to also do my crown which was an area I had lost hair also.

The hair on my scalp had miniaturised, so there was no saving it with medications at that stage. Now, I have effectively used surgery to roll back the clock and implanted new hairs, which are comparatively DHT resistant, to the dead zones.

The question now becomes, how can I best grow and keep this hair, and stop it from miniaturising like the rest of my native hair?

This is where I will need a plan. So far, I have considered the following options:

(a) A low dose of topical fin/min is a possible solution. Maybe. At a low dose, provided I am otherwise healing myself and working hard to build up my biology, I may be just fine.
(b) Natural DHT reducers like saw palmetto, pumpkin seed oil, etc. Create an entirely nature-derived, non-medication based protocol to allow beneficial outcomes for growing & maintaining implanted hair.

If I do NOTHING, the newly implanted hair will just fall out and I'll be back to square one. The nature hair will also miniaturise and this will be gone ttoo. So I'll have been unsucessful in getting my hair back. This isn't acceptable for me.

NEXT STEPS
(A) Order lab tests. This will be done this weekend.
(B) Send off lab tests & await results.
(C) Get lab tests interpreted, make appointment with Dr Marcus, and continue process.

The first ten days of the hair transplant are quite critical. For the grafts to really hold, I have to get this right. This means I will be basically indoors for 10 days, apart from sunrise and sunset, and will take no risks of anyting touching my head.

On the 30th of August, I'll have reached the 10 day mark, and at this stage, can wear a hat to look more presentable. I am also going to do a 3-5 day water fast from 30/08/2022 - 04/09/2022.

A 3 or 5 day water fast will allow me to burn through a lot of toxins, enter autophagy and do a lot of cleaning of my cells, support my mitochondria, burn some bodyfat and get into ketosis. Persistently in this journey, I have not been able to get into ketosis. This is bad! Because for me to really ramp up my healing, particularly of my brain, I need to get into ketosis. The fast will prime me well, and I may even be in ketosis by day 5.

Thereafter, I'll be on a strictly keto based diet and will get my body and brain where I need them.

I won't be avle to exercise until the 18th of September! This will be when I resume resistant training 3 x a week and 60 min runs 2 x a week.

Goal for the end of the year:

Dec - this will be the month 4 mark for the hair transplant. Between month 4-6, 30-40% of the growth of the implanted hairs should be visable. I cannot fail to achieve this. I will need to put a plan in place, and will need to make sure I've gotten here, but without the sexual side effects.

Weight - I want to be 180/185lbs. I am in a good place physically now, I am around 200lbs. But I want to really burn through my fat and clean up my body so I have ultimate energy and function.

Brain - restore clarity and calmness, focus.

Hormones - Keep building on the positive progress I've seen with my sex drive and overcoming my ED, and keep getting my testosterone levels where I need them. Through a lot of tricks and hard work, I am able to basically function, if I do ALL the mitochondrial work. But my system isn't robust and thriving. For that I think I will need to truly clean myself out, get into and stay in ketosis, and participate in maybe another 5 day water fast later in the year beyond the one I've planned.

if I get all this right, I will end the year in a fantastic position.

Remember, I have lost 50 fricken lbs, have gotten over excruciating brain fog, although my brain is still only about 30% of what it was, have beaten ED and a dead libido. I am fitter and stronger than I was. What I am doing IS working but I will not rest until I have achieved what I set about to achieve.

Ravi

### Dr. Marcus Ettinger — 2022-08-20T16:08:56+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-315154>

July 2022 study reaffirms what I know from personal experience.

[Effects of high-intensity interval training (HIIT) and sprint interval training (SIT) on fat oxidation during exercise: a systematic review and meta-analysis](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/35859145/)

Conclusion Engaging in HIIT or SIT can improve FatOx, with larger effects expected for longer training regimens and individuals with overweight/obesity. While some effects seem small, they may be important in holistic approaches to enhance metabolic health and manage obesity.

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-08-20T20:04:51+0300

>
> Proscar, propecia --- 5aR inhibitor

>

>

Here was a good post from Jan.

Dutasteride is clearly a stronger and more potent drug.

Proscar will be a different story. And with the tablets, if I cut them into 4. that makes 1.25mg doses. I can even half that. and create 0.65mg doses. Topicals are more difficult to manage as we cannot understand how much is being absorbed.

I did stop using nizarol following this post BTW.

Ravi

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-08-21T07:31:37+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-315169>

My last day in Turkey. I am flying home today. All has been well with the hair transplant. The next 9 days are important to it's healing, once I pass that window, it'll be smooth sailing I expect.

Funny thing is, I kinda like the bald look on me....Here's pics post surgery the evening of!

SEX DRIVE & ERECTIONS

I am having to sleep in a propped up position due to the hair transplant, and am using a aircraft pillow the clinic provided. For whatever reason, this really awkward position actually supported deep and restorative sleep, I had a very lucid dream, which I remembered for some time after waking, and also (excuse graphic details) had the most absolutely absurd morning wood that didn't go away for the longest time. Crazy. I rememer emailing Dr Marcus in panic about my 'dead dick'. Dutasteride was a scary time for me but my god I did recover. Let it be known to those who suffer from post-fin syndrome that if you work your absolute ass off, and I took hours of action daily, you can heal.....I do not want that problem again but I also want to restore my hair. We have some work to do.

It is undeniable I am now a far cry from how I used to be.

I am healthier and stronger because I did the work to be, and will continue to do this.

@JanSv: OK, I can assure you I will not take anything at all until we've done all the lab tests and we've understood where I am with my DHT.

[@Dr. Marcus Ettinger](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/22755/): Great. I've emailed you Doc, hopefully we can get this test shipped out and I'll do it ASAP.

I will also order a mobile blood draw service and get a bunch of tests done at my place.

Positive progress will come.

I will achieve my goals for the year. I am also looking forward to the 3-5 day water fast I will do which will clean my cells out a lot.

Ravi

**Oestradiol**
\====================
This highly important, but testing requires specification of more informations.

You really want to test
E1-estrone
E2-estradiol (sensitive)
E3-estriol
Total Estrogens
\==============================
E2(sensitive)
Laboratories often have variety of estradiol tests, but they are meant for women (who have more of it).
Man usually has less of estradiol, higher sensitivity testing is need.
................

Fat people have more fat in their bodies.
Fat contains aromatase.
Aromatase takes testosterone and makes estradiol out of it. Higer estradiol promotes (all kind) of growths.
Man boobs, cancer.
Fat people (may) end up with lower testosterone.

There is a brown and white fat.

### Ravi Sandhu — 2022-10-13T16:54:02+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/seeking-transformation-ravis-journal-forgiveness-changing-all-my-relationships.25642/post-316559>

HELLO FRIENDS

Well....what's the latest with me?

All was well. I then had a few things that disrupted my journey.

I had a hair transplant in August. 2747 folicles inplanted into my frontal region.

I then had to focus on recovery for 30 days. This included no exercise, and I couldnt do things like CT.

This resulted in me losing a bit of charge and after about 30-35 days, I noticed I did start to feel a bit worse and also anxious.

I then went on a trip to Poland for 2 weeks.

This was quite stressful in the end for a variety of reasons, but all the while, I had been exercising little, not following my protocols, and suffering because of it.

I then wake up one day and notice, the morning wood is gone. The classic sign I have been losing electrons and my organism is weakening again.

This will not work for me.

The girl I was seeing had some tumult in her personal life about 6 weeks ago and just ghosted me. It hurt, a lot, but I got over it.

I am of course back on the dating scene. But I now have to return to my mitochondriac work and get my system working again.

Man, I couldn't do CT due to the hair transplant, and there was no tub in Poland. These things have been hard to access lately.

But I have ability to act now. I have been watching the sunrise, exercising, consuming DHA, and will resume CT and use of my Sperti light today.

Drinking lots of water with Ultima electrolyte powder and salt.

I am doing the odd fast, usually one day a week.

I have a date tomorrow night (Fri) so lets hope I can get things working again before then LOL.

IN OTHER NEWS

Well, I had the work done on my hair. To get it looking good, I've been advised to use minoxidil and finasteride. As a guy with proneness to ED, I am fearful of finasteride and may not bother. But I need to do SOMETHING. I would like to explore the use of minoxidil.

Folks, if you can take a look at my labs and give me your thoughts, it'd be appreciated.

I still need to get my DUTCH test done, it has arrived, it's at my parents address actually. I will go home and see them and complete it soon.

Thereafter, I will send these reports to Dr Ettinger and get a consult done.

For now, this is what I have.

[@JanSz](https://forum.jackkruse.com/members/933/) your thoughts would be appreciated here.

[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1p4gjOeiyUAVKoBqBB4UMHQr4jxY4z3X3Qsk\_mlgs-Z4/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1p4gjOeiyUAVKoBqBB4UMHQr4jxY4z3X3Qsk_mlgs-Z4/edit?usp=sharing)

Best wishes,
Ravi

I will need to reach 3k a month to go over to the tropics and deeply heal myself.

I will need to get to an ideal light environment, soak up the sun for many hours a day, eat lots of DHA, and let time pass.

In truth, there is a lot of potential inside me. I am very driven and unlike many who come to these ideas, I do this stuff EVERY DAY.

I worked hard since I got here.

I think I could get to the next level by being in the right environment, I also need to connect with other real black swans and learn more.

I will keep posting and I am sure things will align for me.

Right now I am sat in a cafe, the sun is flowing in and the windows and doors are open. I will go to the gym later. Body composition has remained solid, it's 195lbs this morning. I want to be 185lbs. But I started here so fat. I am stronger and healthier than I was.

But why settle for B when A+ is available?

Ravi
